page_content:
CPSA250 College Park Scholars: Arts Research Practicum (2 Credits) Supervised research project in an area related to the arts. Prerequisite: CPSA200. Restriction: Students must be matriculated into the College Park Scholars Arts (CPSA) program. Additional Information: When paired with successful completion of CPSA 200, students will earn General Education Scholarship-in-Practice credit.

CPSD240 College Park Scholars: Science, Discovery & the Universe - Service-Learning Practicum (1-3 Credits) Supervised Service-Learning project in an interest area related to science, discovery and the universe. Prerequisite: CPSD200. Restriction: Students must be enrolled in the College Park Scholars Science, Discovery & the Universe (CPSD) program.

CPSA260 College Park Scholars: Arts Peer-Teaching Practicum (2 Credits) Supervised peer-teaching project in an area related to the arts. Prerequisite: CPSA200. Restriction: Students must be matriculated into the College Park Scholars Arts (CPSA) program. Additional Information: When paired with successful completion of CPSA 200, students will earn General Education Scholarship-in-Practice credit.

CPSD250 College Park Scholars: Science, Discovery & the Universe - Research Practicum (1-3 Credits) Supervised research project in an interest area related to science, discovery and the universe. Prerequisite: CPSD200. Restriction: Students must be enrolled in the College Park Scholars Science, Discovery & the Universe (CPSD) program.
